notes: Level 9 packet 10-14 reviewed manually against canonical prose, structured markdown, and runtime JSON.
Prismatic Wall remains open for layer-table extraction because the local canonical capture references the Prismatic Layers table but does not contain the table rows.

power-word-kill::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible creature requirement is represented by lineOfSight true and single targeting within 60 feet.
power-word-kill::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps lineOfSight true and targeting range 60.

power-word-kill::object_stats_or_damagea.issue: Actionable open: The hit point threshold death branch needs a threshold/instant-death schema; current DAMAGE can only preserve the high-HP damage branch.
power-word-kill::object_stats_or_damagea.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a threshold outcome bucket for hit-point-threshold instant death versus fallback damage.
power-word-kill::object_stats_or_damagea.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records 12d12 Psychic damage and Death threshold Utility Option.

power-word-kill::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The 100 Hit Point branch is now explicitly split from the damage branch in Utility Options.
power-word-kill::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No new field required for this pass.
power-word-kill::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include Death threshold and Psychic damage branch.

prismatic-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Actionable open: Layer-specific Dexterity saves and effects require the Prismatic Layers table, which is referenced but not captured in the local canonical prose.
prismatic-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add/capture a prismatic layer table bucket with per-layer save and effect rows.
prismatic-wall::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON currently records near-wall Constitution Blinded save and flags layer table need in prompt/options.

prismatic-wall::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: Wall/globe geometry, occupied-space failure, pass-through safety, and blocking wall behavior are now represented by spatial details, Terrain wall, and Utility Options.
prismatic-wall::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
prismatic-wall::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes TERRAIN wall and controlOptions.

prismatic-wall::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: Bright Light, Dim Light, opacity, and near-wall visibility trigger are now separated into Utility Options and light fields.
prismatic-wall::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON utility.light records 100-foot bright and additional 100-foot dim light.

prismatic-wall::created_object_or_struct.issue: Actionable open: Seven separately destructible layers need a layered object schema with AC, order, and destruction methods.
prismatic-wall::created_object_or_struct.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a layered object/barrier bucket for ordered layer destruction.
prismatic-wall::created_object_or_struct.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records wall AC and layer facts in Utility Options but not layer objects.

prismatic-wall::travel_or_planar_movemen.issue: Closed: Safe passage through/near the wall for designated creatures is now a Utility Option.
prismatic-wall::travel_or_planar_movemen.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions include Designated safe creatures.

prismatic-wall::object_stats_or_damageab.issue: Actionable open: AC 10 is stored, but hp is unknown and layer-specific destruction methods are missing from canonical capture.
prismatic-wall::object_stats_or_damageab.recommendedTemplateChange: Add complete layer stat/destruction rows once the table is captured.
prismatic-wall::object_stats_or_damageab.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses wallProperties AC 10 with hp 0 sentinel plus Utility Options.

prismatic-wall::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: The near-wall Blinded condition is now represented by structured Conditions Applied and a STATUS_CONDITION effect.
prismatic-wall::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes Blinded status effect with Constitution save.

prismatic-wall::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Occupied-space instant ending, per-layer destruction, and Dispel Magic only affecting violet are now separated in Utility Options.
prismatic-wall::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
prismatic-wall::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the conditional ending/removal rules.

psychic-scream::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Up to ten chosen visible creatures is now represented by Targeting Max 10 and Utility Options.

psychic-scream::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: The Intelligence save for half damage is represented on DAMAGE and the save-negated Stunned effect.
psychic-scream::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes Intelligence save DAMAGE and STATUS_CONDITION effects.

psychic-scream::repeat_save_or_recurring.issue: Closed: The end-turn repeat Intelligence save is now represented on the Stunned statusCondition repeatSave.
psychic-scream::repeat_save_or_recurring.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON statusCondition.repeatSave captures the recurring check.

psychic-scream::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: The visible target requirement is represented by lineOfSight true and Targeting Max 10.

psychic-scream::status_or_state_change.issue: Closed: Stunned is now represented by structured Conditions Applied and a STATUS_CONDITION effect.
psychic-scream::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes Stunned status effect.

psychic-scream::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The Stunned ending condition is the end-turn repeat save, now captured on the status effect.

shapechange::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed: Form eligibility, repeat Magic-action shape-shift, and equipment choice are now split into Utility Options and a player prompt.
shapechange::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
shapechange::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions and granted action preserve choices.

shapechange::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: Equipment dropping to the ground is now captured as part of the Equipment choice option.
shapechange::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve equipment drop/fit choice.

shapechange::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: Seen-form eligibility is now captured in the Eligible form Utility Option and prompt.
shapechange::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON prompt asks for eligible seen form.

shapechange::message_or_communication.issue: Closed: Retained ability to communicate is now explicitly included in the Stat replacement Utility Option.
shapechange::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve communication retention.

shapechange::healing_or_restoration.issue: Actionable open: Temporary hit points from first-form HP can be marked, but the runtime cannot calculate form-derived THP or model vanish-on-end directly.
shapechange::healing_or_restoration.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a form-derived temporary hit point bucket.
shapechange::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses DEFENSIVE temporary_hp and Utility Options.

shapechange::object_stats_or_damageabili.issue: Actionable open: Replacing the caster statistics while retaining selected traits needs a transformation/stat-replacement schema.
shapechange::object_stats_or_damageabili.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a transformation bucket for replacement and retained-stat lists.
shapechange::object_stats_or_damageabili.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records replacement/retention in Utility Options only.

shapechange::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Shape-shifted form is a form/state transformation, not a simple status; current STATUS_CONDITION would misrepresent it.
shapechange::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a form transformation state bucket.
shapechange::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Shapechange as Utility Options and temporary_hp effect.

shapechange::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Duration/concentration ending and repeat Magic-action reshaping are now represented by duration, Utility Options, and granted action.
shapechange::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes granted action for repeat shape-shift.

shapechange::aftermath_or_memory.issue: Closed: The equipment and temporary-hit-point aftermath are now captured in Equipment choice and Temporary hit points options.
shapechange::aftermath_or_memory.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the aftermath facts.

storm-of-vengeance::attack_or_save_modif.issue: Closed: Constitution and Dexterity saves are now represented on the relevant damage/status effects.
storm-of-vengeance::attack_or_save_modif.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes save conditions for initial Thunder/Deafened and Turn 3 Lightning.

storm-of-vengeance::multi_instance_or_sp.closedReason: Closed by adding a reusable Effect Schedule field family and runtime effectSchedule object. Storm of Vengeance now records later caster-turn stages for Turn 2 acid rain, Turn 3 six distinct lightning targets, Turn 4 hailstones, and Turns 5-10 freezing rain/control while keeping the existing effect packets as the mechanical payloads.
storm-of-vengeance::multi_instance_or_sp.issue: Closed: Turn-numbered staged effects are now represented by Effect Schedule fields; the schedule also records the Turn 3 six-different-target lightning stage.
storm-of-vengeance::multi_instance_or_sp.recommendedTemplateChange: Effect Schedule Timing, Entry Count, numbered Effect Schedule Entry fields, and Effect Schedule Notes now cover turn ranges and per-turn effects.
storm-of-vengeance::multi_instance_or_sp.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes effectSchedule entries with turn ranges, effect indices, effect types, target count, target eligibility, and distinct-target rule.

storm-of-vengeance::terrain_or_surface.issue: Closed: Difficult Terrain and Heavily Obscured are now represented by TERRAIN effects and Utility Options.
storm-of-vengeance::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes difficult and obscuring terrain effects.

storm-of-vengeance::vision_light_sound.issue: Closed: Heavily Obscured, strong wind, and ranged weapon impossibility are now captured in Area control Utility Option and terrain effect.
storm-of-vengeance::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
storm-of-vengeance::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON controlOptions preserve the visibility and ranged-attack restrictions.

storm-of-vengeance::healing_or_restorati.issue: Closed: This was a false-positive bucket from “freezing rain”; no healing or restoration mechanic exists in canonical prose.

storm-of-vengeance::status_or_state_chan.issue: Closed: Deafened is now represented by structured Conditions Applied and STATUS_CONDITION effect.
storm-of-vengeance::status_or_state_chan.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes Deafened status effect.

storm-of-vengeance::environmental_change.issue: Closed: Storm cloud, acid rain, lightning, hail, freezing rain, strong wind, difficult terrain, and heavy obscurement are now split into effects and Utility Options.
storm-of-vengeance::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required in this pass.
storm-of-vengeance::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes multiple damage, terrain, and utility option entries.

storm-of-vengeance::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: The staged effects all occur within the existing concentration 1 minute duration; the schedule gap is tracked separately as actionable_open.
storm-of-vengeance::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required for this pass.
storm-of-vengeance::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON keeps concentration duration and staged utility options.
